RichTextBox.name: RichTextBox
RichTextBox.label: Documentation Overview
RichTextBox.tooltip:
Describe the documentation that will be provided to the trainee.
Include any instructions or credentials that might be needed to access the material.

NumericTextBox1.name: NumericTextBox1
NumericTextBox1.label: Length (Hours)
NumericTextBox1.tooltip: Estimated length of the training in hours.

Format.name: Format
Format.label: Format
Format.tooltip: Only mandatory if "Include Training Course(s) to Execute" is checked.

Label8.name: Label8
Label8.label: Trainings consist of up to 4 phases.  Select phases that will apply to this training and then define each phase in the sections that appear below.

Label10.name: Label10
Label10.label:
Enter a URL and optional display name, then click "Add Training Course" to build a list of training courses that the trainee will be asked to complete.
After building the list, a description for each URL can be added directly in the grid.

lblFormatMessage.name: lblFormatMessage
lblFormatMessage.label: If the format is either Web-based Self-paced or Web-based Instructor-led, you must add at least one Training URL.

NumericTextBox.name: NumericTextBox
NumericTextBox.label: Deadline (Days)
NumericTextBox.tooltip: How many days the trainee has to complete the training once they receive the task.

Label1.name: Label1
Label1.label: Use the tabs below to assign different types of documentation for the trainee to read or absorb.

SingleSelectDropdown1.name: SingleSelectDropdown1
SingleSelectDropdown1.label: Status
SingleSelectDropdown1.tooltip:
Training tasks are only created if the Status is set to Active.
Use Inactive to create a training definition but not send training tasks to trainees.

Label2.name: Label2
Label2.label:
Select which type(s) of questionnaire to use for pre-training assessment.
Any combination of Default, Customized or External questionnaires can be used.

TrainingName.name: TrainingName
TrainingName.label: Training Name
TrainingName.placeholder: Provide a short description of the training

MultiSelectDropdown1.name: MultiSelectDropdown1
MultiSelectDropdown1.label: Training Execution Reviewer
MultiSelectDropdown1.tooltip: The training execution reviewer decides whether each trainee has completed or should retake the training.

Label3.name: Label3
Label3.label:
Select which type(s) of questionnaire to use for post-training assessment.
Any combination of Default, Customized or External questionnaires can be used.
At least one customized post-training question/External Post training questionnaire should be included when the user selects the score.

TextBox2.name: TextBox2
TextBox2.label: Version
TextBox2.tooltip:
The minor version number increases when an unapproved training definition is edited.
The major version number increases when an approved training definition is edited.

NeedDocumentation.name: NeedDocumentation
NeedDocumentation.label: Include documentation to read
NeedDocumentation.tooltip: Documentation for the trainee to read as part of their training.

BuiltInQuestions.name: BuiltInQuestions
BuiltInQuestions.label:
The default pre-training questionnaire consists of these questions:
• Have you been exposed to this topic in the past? (yes/no)
• Have you ever been trained on this topic? (yes/no) 
• Do you have practical experience related to this topic? (yes/no)
• Do you consider yourself a Subject Matter Expert?​ (yes/no)
• Do you feel you know this topic well enough to not require training? (yes/no)
• Rate your current knowledge of the associated training topic (1 to 10)
• Based on your knowledge of this topic, what are the key points that you hope this training will cover in detail? (optional)

CheckBox6.name: CheckBox6
CheckBox6.label: Include a Default Post-Training Questionnaire
CheckBox6.tooltip: Pre-defined questions intended to gather feedback from each trainee on the training program.

AssessmentMethod.name: AssessmentMethod
AssessmentMethod.label: Assessment Method
AssessmentMethod.tooltip:
Attendance: No specific assessment method enforced beyond a sign-off by a designated reviewer.
Score: Post-Training assessment requires a passing grade on one of the questionnaires.
Certification: Trainee will receive certification details to enter before submitting their training for review.

Reviewer.name: Reviewer
Reviewer.label: Training Definition Reviewer
Reviewer.tooltip: The training definition reviewer will approve or reject the training definition.

NeedCourse.name: NeedCourse
NeedCourse.label: Include training course(s) to execute
NeedCourse.tooltip:
Training courses for the trainee to execute as part of their training.
These are entered as URLs to courses hosted outside of the training task.

SingleSelectDropdown2.name: SingleSelectDropdown2
SingleSelectDropdown2.label: Select a Rule folder
SingleSelectDropdown2.tooltip: If the grid remains empty after selection, ensure that the folder is not empty.

SingleSelectDropdown3.name: SingleSelectDropdown3
SingleSelectDropdown3.label: Select a Document folder
SingleSelectDropdown3.tooltip: If the grid remains empty after selection, ensure that the folder is not empty.

rblIsEvaluated.name: rblIsEvaluated
rblIsEvaluated.label: Will the external post-training questionnaire be evaluated?

SingleSelectDropdown4.name: SingleSelectDropdown4
SingleSelectDropdown4.label: Select a Process folder
SingleSelectDropdown4.tooltip: If the grid remains empty after selection, ensure that the folder is not empty.

GridEpcObjectRule.name: GridEpcObjectRule
GridEpcObjectRule.label: Select Rule(s) to assign, then click Assign Selected

TrainingCourseDescription.name: TrainingCourseDescription
TrainingCourseDescription.label: Training Course Overview
TrainingCourseDescription.tooltip:
Describe the training courses that the trainee will execute.
Include any instructions or credentials that might be needed to access the courses.

GridEpcObjectDocument.name: GridEpcObjectDocument
GridEpcObjectDocument.label: Select Document(s) to assign, then click Assign Selected

Label9.name: Label9
Label9.label:
Enter a URL and optional display name, then click "Add Documentation" to build a list of documentation URLs that will be provided to the trainee.
After building the list, a description for each URL can be added directly in the grid.

GridEpcObjectProcess.name: GridEpcObjectProcess
GridEpcObjectProcess.label: Select Process(es) to assign, then click Assign Selected

PostBuiltInQuestion.name: PostBuiltInQuestion
PostBuiltInQuestion.label:
The default post-training questionnaire consists of these questions:
• Rate your own knowledge of the training topic upon completion of the training. (1 to 10)
• Do you feel the training brought value? (yes/no)
• Do you feel the training was adequate & complete? (yes/no)
• Would you be interested in attending additional trainings related to this topic? (yes/no)
• What did you feel was incorrect or should be updated in the training? (optional)
• What are the key points that you felt should be covered in greater detail? (optional)
• What are the key topics that weren’t covered at all during the training? (optional)

NeedPreAssessment.name: NeedPreAssessment
NeedPreAssessment.label: Include pre-assessment
NeedPreAssessment.tooltip: Questionnaire(s) to be answered by the trainee before proceeding to the rest of the training.

CheckBox5.name: CheckBox5
CheckBox5.label: Include a Default Pre-Training Questionnaire
CheckBox5.tooltip: Pre-defined questions intended to determine each trainee's level of experience with the subject matter.

CheckBox2.name: CheckBox2
CheckBox2.label: Create a Customized Pre-Training Questionnaire
CheckBox2.tooltip: Define any number of pre-training questions to be answered by the trainee.

CheckBox1.name: CheckBox1
CheckBox1.label: Link an External Pre-Training Questionnaire
CheckBox1.tooltip: Enter a URL that links to an external pre-training questionnaire to be completed by the trainee.

ActivationDate.name: ActivationDate
ActivationDate.label: Activation Date
ActivationDate.tooltip: Trainees will receive their training tasks as of this date - assuming the Status of the training definition is Active.

CheckBox4.name: CheckBox4
CheckBox4.label: Create a Customized Post-Training Questionnaire
CheckBox4.tooltip: Define any number of post-training questions for the trainee to answer.

CheckBox3.name: CheckBox3
CheckBox3.label: Link an External Post-Training Questionnaire
CheckBox3.tooltip: Enter a URL that links to an external pre-training questionnaire for the trainee to complete.

Training_FrequencyName.name: Training_FrequencyName
Training_FrequencyName.label: Frequency
Training_FrequencyName.tooltip: How often the training should be repeated.

NeedPostAssessment.name: NeedPostAssessment
NeedPostAssessment.label: Include post-assessment
NeedPostAssessment.tooltip: Questionnaire(s) to be answered by the trainee after completing all previous sections, meant to gauge effectiveness of the training or gather feedback.

Label4.name: Label4
Label4.label: Define which Departments, Roles, Users or Groups will undergo this training.

Label5.name: Label5
Label5.label:
Once assigned, Rules are listed in the grid below.
You can edit any row to specify a version of the Rule to use, or mark the Rule as supporting documentation.
Supporting documentation is meant to provide the user with additional information, and will not create a training task in EPC.

Label6.name: Label6
Label6.label:
Once assigned, Documents are listed in the grid below.
You can edit any row to specify a version of the Document to use, or mark the Document as supporting documentation.
Supporting documentation is meant to provide the user with additional information, and will not create a training task in EPC.

Label7.name: Label7
Label7.label:
Once assigned, Processes are listed in the grid below.
You can edit any row to specify a version of the Process to use, or mark the Process as supporting documentation.
Supporting documentation is meant to provide the user with additional information, and will not create a training task in EPC.

LblOnlyNewTrainings.name: LblOnlyNewTrainings
LblOnlyNewTrainings.label: Any modifications made to the training will only apply to future instances.

children.caption: Any modifications made to the training will only apply to future instances.
Trainings consist of up to 4 phases.  Select phases that will apply to this training and then define each phase in the sections that appear below.

Select which type(s) of questionnaire to use for pre-training assessment.
Any combination of Default, Customized or External questionnaires can be used.

The default pre-training questionnaire consists of these questions:
• Have you been exposed to this topic in the past? (yes/no)
• Have you ever been trained on this topic? (yes/no) 
• Do you have practical experience related to this topic? (yes/no)
• Do you consider yourself a Subject Matter Expert?​ (yes/no)
• Do you feel you know this topic well enough to not require training? (yes/no)
• Rate your current knowledge of the associated training topic (1 to 10)
• Based on your knowledge of this topic, what are the key points that you hope this training will cover in detail? (optional)
Use the tabs below to assign different types of documentation for the trainee to read or absorb.
Select Rule(s) to assign, then click Assign Selected

Once assigned, Rules are listed in the grid below.
You can edit any row to specify a version of the Rule to use, or mark the Rule as supporting documentation.
Supporting documentation is meant to provide the user with additional information, and will not create a training task in EPC.
Select Document(s) to assign, then click Assign Selected

Once assigned, Documents are listed in the grid below.
You can edit any row to specify a version of the Document to use, or mark the Document as supporting documentation.
Supporting documentation is meant to provide the user with additional information, and will not create a training task in EPC.
Select Process(es) to assign, then click Assign Selected

Once assigned, Processes are listed in the grid below.
You can edit any row to specify a version of the Process to use, or mark the Process as supporting documentation.
Supporting documentation is meant to provide the user with additional information, and will not create a training task in EPC.

Enter a URL and optional display name, then click "Add Documentation" to build a list of documentation URLs that will be provided to the trainee.
After building the list, a description for each URL can be added directly in the grid.
If the format is either Web-based Self-paced or Web-based Instructor-led, you must add at least one Training URL.

Enter a URL and optional display name, then click "Add Training Course" to build a list of training courses that the trainee will be asked to complete.
After building the list, a description for each URL can be added directly in the grid.

Select which type(s) of questionnaire to use for post-training assessment.
Any combination of Default, Customized or External questionnaires can be used.
At least one customized post-training question/External Post training questionnaire should be included when the user selects the score.

The default post-training questionnaire consists of these questions:
• Rate your own knowledge of the training topic upon completion of the training. (1 to 10)
• Do you feel the training brought value? (yes/no)
• Do you feel the training was adequate & complete? (yes/no)
• Would you be interested in attending additional trainings related to this topic? (yes/no)
• What did you feel was incorrect or should be updated in the training? (optional)
• What are the key points that you felt should be covered in greater detail? (optional)
• What are the key topics that weren’t covered at all during the training? (optional)
Will the external post-training questionnaire be evaluated?
Define which Departments, Roles, Users or Groups will undergo this training.
